calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:33AM

Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Thien Nga Thi Tran appears in pro per. Respondent, Peter Bogdanov in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles.

EXA1: Documentation of invoices and e-mails; collectively marked.
EXRA: Documentation of transaction; collectively marked. Gift Certificates provided as evidence given back to Appellant since it is an original financial document for the Appellant's business.

11:10AM
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Judgment Entered
